CustomField.description: Fully qualified class name of the approval channel to use (must implement UoWInterfaces.IApprovalChannel). If blank, uses UoWSalesforceApprovalChannel.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fully qualified class name of the approval channel to use (must implement UoWInterfaces.IApprovalChannel). If blank, uses UoWSalesforceApprovalChannel.
CustomField.label: Approval Channel Class Name
